task_description: Three changes to the onboarding/candidate feature: (1) Rename 'onboarding form' to 'Candidate Information Sheet' everywhere in the UI, (2) Replace the 'Work Site' (aka 'Site Assignment') column in the Candidate List with 'Home State', and (3) Fix the edit bug where changes are not being persisted.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes for all modified files. Pre-existing errors exist in unrelated spec files (onboarding.service.spec.ts uses outdated OfferStatus values, mapping spec uses outdated Technician fields). No new errors introduced by our changes.
